title: Milk Chocolatey Croatian Chicken Wrap
description: A unique halal-friendly Croatian dish featuring milk chocolate and leaf-wrapped chicken, perfect for a romantic dinner. This wine-infused recipe is sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together red wine, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken strips to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Wrap each chicken strip in a collard green leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place the wrapped chicken on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes.
Melt the milk chocolate chips in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Once the chicken is cooked, brush the melted chocolate on top of each wrap.
Garnish with fresh herbs or edible flowers for a romantic touch.
